title: Are you going to allow single users to upgrade
excerpt: I understand Monday.com was originally built to collaborte with teams, but for those of us that have small businesses and multiple projects, Monday.com seems to be a great tool but like myself, I am not ready to collabor…

posts.author: ecatcher (Buddy Swift)
posts.cookedHtml: I understand Monday.com was originally built to collaborte with teams, but for those of us that have small businesses and multiple projects, Monday.com seems to be a great tool but like myself, I am not ready to collaborate with other individuals. Why are we forced to purchase another product, then later we will not want to switch to Monday or it will be too much of a hassle. It seems, you would want to grow with small businesses. Instead of three minimum, just take your prices and slightly increase them for individuals till we grow. Just a thought.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a great suggestion. Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum
